stories.title: Five reasons the Hurricanes will win the Stanley C...
stories.summary: Here are the factors that will determine the Stanley Cup Final -- and why the Canes will come out on top.

stories.title: Early look at the Stanley Cup Final: Golden Knight...
stories.summary: Who will win the championship? The series begins Tuesday on ABC, but here's a head start on all the intel.

stories.title: SGA calls MVP year a 'failure' after OKC falls sho...
stories.summary: Despite claiming his second straight MVP, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander called his season a failure after the Thunder were eliminated before getting a chance to defend their title in the NBA Finals.

stories.title: Harper on labor talks: 'Can't lose that momentum'
stories.summary: Phillies star Bryce Harper expressed concern over what could happen to the sport if the 2027 season is compromised because of a lockout.

stories.title: U.S. beats Senegal as Pulisic nets 1st goal of '26...
stories.summary: Christian Pulisic ended a five-month scoring drought for club and country with his first international goal since November 2024 as the United States beat Senegal 3-2 on Sunday in the Americans' next-to-last World Cup warmup match.
